metadata.description: AI-native project management for Claude Code — persistent memory, sprint planning, decision traceability.

plugins.name: sprintra
plugins.description: Memory Layer Phase 6 — opt-in continuous capture. Local SQLite buffer survives Wi-Fi flaps + crashes; redacts secrets before disk; auto-attaches unmarked repos; recovers crashed sessions from local transcripts. Plus SessionStart briefing, UserPromptSubmit + PostToolUse capture, Stop digest, 6 PM skills, 20 MCP tools.
